title: cheilanthes mexicana
intro: Cheilanthes mexicana, also known as the Mexican lip fern or Mexican cloak fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family wood-sorrel family (Wood-sorrel family is not entirely accurate. Cheilanthes mexicana belongs to the Pteridaceae family). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cheilanthes mexicana include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions, such as fever, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. Cheilanthes mexicana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional remedies for its supposed healing properties.
